title: Platform Owner - XBot Orchestration System
bullets: Owned end-to-end XBot lifecycle - architecture, deployment, scaling, observability - on GCP VMs with Apache Airflow

Designed ManEx v3: low-code automation engine, 15+ reusable components, query-driven workflow triggers where non-engineers write a query and invoke a function to trigger an action (mail, data transfer, etc.)

Implemented data access layer for third-party delivery partners: consolidated multi-table data into a unified table for secure partner consumption - used for dashboard building and data validation, eliminating direct DB exposure

Implemented RBAC for third-party delivery partners: restricted webserver access to partner-specific endpoints only, and consolidated multi-table data into a unified table for secure partner consumption - used for dashboard building and data validation, eliminating direct DB exposure
Delivered custom client integrations - SAP for HRI and multiple custom requirements for ITC and vendor data processing catering 400+ HMCL vendors
Incremental ETL + historical snapshots across 12+ MySQL tables - 100% reproducibility, time-travel analytics
CI/CD via Jenkins + GitHub for controlled DAG promotion from QA to production with zero-downtime deploys
100K+ logs/month centralized on GCS with automated lifecycle retention; 5,000+ notification alerts/month
Processed 1M+ IoT records/month (OEE, energy, SPC, alarms) into real-time KPIs for 14+ factory plant managers
Architecting Kafka streaming pipelines for real-time IoT telemetry ingestion [in progress]

title: Python Developer - Data Pipelines & Automation

Integrated third-party REST APIs with OAuth and JWT authentication mechanisms to expand platform functionality
Designed scalable data framework for partitioning raw MySQL tables, optimising performance across 12 GB+ datasets
Enforced best coding practices and maintained 85%+ test coverage, reducing production defects by 25%

title: Python Intern - Workflow Orchestration

Deployed Apache Airflow on GCP Compute Engine with Airflow metadata DB on Cloud SQL to support custom client orchestration requirements

Converted to full-time Senior Developer within ~2.5 months on the basis of early output
